name: stripe-cancel-subscription
description: Cancel a Stripe subscription immediately or at the end of the current billing period. Immediate cancellation stops billing right away; at-period-end lets the customer use their remaining paid time before cancellation takes effect. Use in churn workflows triggered by user requests or payment failures.

API_KEY_SECRET.description: Vault path to the Stripe secret key.

SUBSCRIPTION_ID.description: Stripe subscription ID (sub_xxx). Supports {{subscription_id}} template interpolation.

CANCEL_AT_PERIOD_END.description: If false (default): cancel immediately via DELETE. If true: schedule cancellation at end of billing period — customer keeps access until then.

setup_instructions.title: Immediate vs scheduled cancellation
setup_instructions.detail: CANCEL_AT_PERIOD_END=false (default): subscription is canceled immediately, customer loses access now. CANCEL_AT_PERIOD_END=true: subscription is marked to cancel at period end, status becomes 'active' with cancel_at_period_end=true — customer keeps access until current_period_end.

setup_instructions.title: Typical churn workflow
setup_instructions.detail: Chain: [customer requests cancellation] → [stripe-cancel-subscription: SUBSCRIPTION_ID={{subscription_id}}, CANCEL_AT_PERIOD_END=true] → [send farewell email] → [log churn event].
